emails.subject: Black Marlin
emails.body: Black Marlin Mike, I show you pathed deal 951474 on 8/23/01 for production months January and February 2001. This deal expired 12/31/00, and the late pathing has caused a bridgeback error for January and February 2001. <Embedded Picture (Metafile)>

emails.subject: FW: Black Marlin
emails.body: FW: Black Marlin Have you had a chance to look at this yet?

emails.subject: RE: Black Marlin
emails.body: RE: Black Marlin It has been taken care of. Let me know if you need anythign further.
